title: Recurring task issues

posts.author: supportkim (Ify)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am struggling to create an automation.

Here is the use case:

A task should recur on a weekly basis. It should be such that once the task status is marked as done(completed), a new task is created with following details (same assignee, previous date + 1 month, status as new, same name). I want the new task created to not have copy on the item name.

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

We’ve been inspired by all these comments about creating this feature and good news, we went and created the app! We’ve just launched Recurring Tasks, which now allows you to create recurring/repeating tasks in your monday.com boards. It is currently in Beta so please download it, give it a try and we would love to know what you think. I’ll also be more than happy to directly feed it back to our team! If you want to book a chat with me directly, here’s my calendly: Calendly - Amalia Rubino Muñoz

Thanks,
Amalia
